sources.title: Burst Theory (Full Movie) Drama, Mystery, Thriller, 2015
sources.description:
Burst Theory Full Movie. Researchers in a remote island facility test an advanced treatment for a deadly virus that threatens to wipe out half of humanity. When one of the scientists is killed, the lead researcher realizes a conspiracy threatens all of them.

Directed by Zac Page
2015
Starring Joseph Scott Anthony, Lisa Mueller, Ralph Lister

Edited for YouTube ad standards

metadata.Plot: A scientist at a remote facility questions the nature of a bird flu vaccine his team is studying when a colleague unexpectedly contracts the virus under suspicious circumstances. Soon, he discovers his worst nightmares are about to become reality - his life, and perhaps the lives of millions, are hanging by a thread. Hunting for the truth, he spirals into a grim conspiracy and is forced to question everything he once took for granted. Including his own sanity.
metadata.Actors: Joseph Scott Anthony, Lisa Mueller, Ralph Lister
